text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won! I WOOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I did it! Me! I'm a Derby champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket conquers the<n>Japanese Derby, the
race she's<n>been dreaming of winning since the
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And it was the race of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah! Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo!<n>Tic-ke-zo!
Tic-ke-zo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! My fans!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for cheering me on! Thank<n>you! I... I DID
IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Damn... I lost!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(How did she do that? I couldn't<n>catch up no
matter how hard I tried!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Is that how strong she really is?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! And I'm just getting<n>started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show you all what<n>dreams are made
of, so keep<n>watching me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dreams...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's so genuine about everything,<n>from the way
she gets excited to the<n>way she celebrates.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Her presence is overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket... It seems I misjudged that<n>explosive
power of yours.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, this is the last time I let you<n>win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I must recalculate my strategy right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

Sure, she didn't win, but she still<n>made it on the
scoreboard. That's an<n>achievement in and of
itself.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to let anyone say things are<n>over for me
just 'cause I lost here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not when I still have the Kikuka Sho to<n>win!

The finale of the Triple Crown tour,<n>the Kikuka Sho,
awaits us next.

She reaffirms her dedication to keep<n>pushing on
so she can seize the next<n>crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I have to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I win, then one day...
